title: Claude Fable 5：首个Mythos级模型发布
full_text:
ClaudeDevs on X: "Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model.
It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.
We've added fallbacks: a refused request retries on Claude Opus 4.8 instead of dead-ending. https://t.co/iL1Rd6H5pJ" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
ClaudeDevs
@ClaudeDevs
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model.
It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.
We've added fallbacks: a refused request retries on Claude Opus 4.8 instead of dead-ending.
00:00
7:24 PM · Jun 9, 2026 247.9K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Claude Fable 5 是我们首个普遍可用的 Mythos-class 模型。 它搭载了新的安全分类器，可能会标记网络和生物等双重用途领域的某些提示词。 我们增加了回退机制：被拒绝的请求会在 Claude Opus 4.8 上重试，而不是直接终止。

key_excerpts.text: Claude Fable 5 是我们首个普遍可用的 Mythos-class 模型。 它搭载了新的安全分类器，可能会标记网络和生物等双重用途领域的某些提示词。 我们增加了回退机制：被拒绝的请求会在 Claude Opus 4.8 上重试，而不是直接终止。
